name: color-swatch-picker
visual_summary: A color swatch picker component is a visual representation of colors, allowing users to select a color from a range of options. Developers would use this component in applications where users need to choose specific colors. The color swatch picker typically displays a palette of colors and allows users to select one or more colors.
generation_prompt:

Tags: color-picker, swatch, color-selector

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types
